components.panel: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-surface_glass border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl
components.button_primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded text-xs px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2
components.telemetry_box: font-mono text-accent_green bg-black/60 p-3 rounded border border-accent_green/30 w-full flex justify-between items-center

aira_avatar.description: Young child portrait used for Aira's profile in the UI

icons.usage: Use icons for Object Spawner buttons (Box, Circle, Sun for light) and Goal states (Target, Navigation, AlertTriangle)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a fullscreen layout using R3F canvas spanning the entire viewport (z-0).
Implement an absolute positioned 2D UI overlay (pointer-events-none on wrapper, pointer-events-auto on panels) to allow interacting with both the 3D scene and the floating UI.
Left Sidebar (Tools): Place Aira's Profile (using aira_avatar), Goal Selector (Shadcn Select), and Object Spawner (grid of Buttons to spawn box, ball, ramp, light).
Right Sidebar (Telemetry & Settings): Show Live Telemetry (using mono font for State, XYZ Position, XYZ Velocity) and Sliders for Speed/Balance (Shadcn Slider).
Aira Character: Implement a basic humanoid structure (ragdoll-like) in Rapier using interconnected RigidBodies and joints (spherical/hinge) to simulate procedural IK movement.
Goals system: Update Aira's target coordinates in zustand store based on the selected goal and position of spawned objects.
Persistence: Store attempt counters, successes, falls, and settings in localStorage.

Styling: Follow Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Use stark dark backgrounds with crisp 1px borders, high-contrast text, Signal Red for falls, Klein Blue for UI accents, and Green for successful goals.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Keep standard HTML inputs out of the design, use Shadcn primitives heavily customized to match the Swiss Dark theme.
